query_normalized: predicting molecular fluorescence quantum yields with graph neural networks chemistry
rationale: The paper is a general survey on active learning for data streams and does not address the specific domain of molecular fluorescence, quantum yields, or the application of Graph Neural Networks to chemistry. It fails to meet any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it lacks the necessary biological/chemical mechanism, domain-specific variables, or foundational methodology for molecular property prediction, representing an off-domain topic that shares only the broad keyword "learning."
